methodology: Age-based classification on open issues. Sample: first 100 most-recently-updated open issues.

notes: High closure rate (240 closed in 30 days) indicates active maintenance
102 issues marked 'inactive' — consider closing or following up
3 P1 issues open including 1 critical security advisory (GHSA-qmgw-45x4-3626)

age_distribution.methodology: Calculated from sample of 100 most recently updated open issues

active_0_7d.description: Recently created or updated, likely actively being worked

aging_8_30d.description: A few weeks old without recent update

stale_31_90d.description: 1–3 months old with no recent activity — needs triage

zombie_over_90d.description: Over 3 months old — potential candidates for closure

bug_health.concern: 79% of sampled bugs are over 90 days old — significant backlog of unresolved bugs

no_label_issues.action: Triage needed — 60 aging unlabeled issues from 8–30 days ago

inactive_issues.description: Issues labeled 'inactive' — no response from author or stalled
inactive_issues.recommendation: Consider auto-closing after 14 more days of inactivity

p1_critical.action_required: Security advisory GHSA-qmgw-45x4-3626 (#12966) requires immediate triage response

recommendations.action: Respond to security advisory GHSA-qmgw-45x4-3626 on issue #12966 immediately
Triage 96 unlabeled issues — add at minimum bug/feature/question labels
Address 79 zombie bugs (>90d) — close duplicates, add to backlog, or fix
Investigate #13608 (mimo streaming) and #13193 (Azure OpenAI regression) — both P1
